MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Maureen McFadden, Esq., appearing for plaintiff/moving party: Jose Ricardo Hernandez
David Semel, Esq., appearing for Defendant/opposing party: San Francisco Optics
International Corporation.
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Jose Ricardo Hernandez's Motion For Protective Order Prohibiting Videotaping Of Continued Sessions Of Plaintiff's Deposition is granted. A party may not choose to videotape a deposition midstream. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

The response is inadequate. A further response shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
